content:
What is your proudest accomplishment in your career?
There are two proud moments in my career. The first was orchestrating the largest response to a complex emergency in Miami-Dade County with professionalism and compassion. The second was completing my master's degree in Public Administration, culminating in years of hard work and dedication to furthering my knowledge and expertise in fire service management and leadership. This achievement symbolizes my personal growth and underscores my commitment to excellence in serving and protecting our community.
Regards,
Oneisys Echenique
Director of Special Events & Donor Relations
Miami Dade College Foundation
300 N.E. 2nd Avenue, Miami, FL 33132
